title: accountsservice bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[23.13.9-8]
- Allow 'Lastname, Firstname' in /etc/passwd
  Resolves: RHEL-12265

[23.13.9-7]
- Backport changes from Fedora 40
  Resolves: RHEL-78526
full_text:
[23.13.9-8]
- Allow 'Lastname, Firstname' in /etc/passwd
  Resolves: RHEL-12265

[23.13.9-7]
- Backport changes from Fedora 40
  Resolves: RHEL-78526
